[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111010 6
1 0011010000 3
2 1010100100 4
3 0111011011 7
4 1011011111 8
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0111111110 8

01 10 0111111111 9
12 21 0111111111 9
23 32 0111111111 9
34 43 0011111010 6 match 0
45 54 1011110100 6
56 65 1111111111 a
67 76 1111011111 9
70 07 1111111111 a

02 20 0111111111 9
13 31 0011111011 7
24 42 0111110111 8
35 53 1011111110 8
46 64 0111011011 7 match 3
57 75 1011111111 9
60 06 0111111111 9
71 17 1011111111 9

03 30 0111111110 8 match 7
14 41 0011111011 7
25 52 1111100111 8
36 63 0111111011 8
47 74 1011011111 8 match 4
50 05 1111111110 9
61 16 0111111011 8
72 27 1111111111 a

04 40 0111111110 8 match 7
15 51 1011111111 9
26 62 0111111111 9
37 73 1011111111 9
